input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.4.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.4.3.2
            TITLE: tech inspectors may require access to check any accumulator(s) for rules compliance

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.4.3.2: Tech inspectors may require access to check any Accumulator(s) for rules compliance
IN.4.3.2 Tech inspectors may require access to check any Accumulator(s) for rules compliance

final_answer: Tech inspectors may require access to check any Accumulator(s) for rules compliance
